name: Favorite Fruit Clafouti
recipeIngredient: 3 cups raspberries, blueberries or sliced strawberries
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat together egg whites, eggs, granulated sugar, honey, liqueur, vanilla, and salt with a wire whisk or electric mixer on low speed until light and frothy.
2. Stir in yogurt until the mixture is smooth.
3. Add flour; beat until combined and the mixture is smooth.
4. Grease a 10-inch quiche dish and arrange the desired berries in the bottom of the dish.
5. Pour batter over the fruit.
6. Bake in a 375°F oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the center appears set when shaken.
7. Cool on a wire rack for 30 minutes.
8. Serve warm. Just before serving, sprinkle with powdered sugar and, if desired, garnish with additional raspberries and edible flowers.
